name: Our Best BLT Chicken and Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon bottled barbecue or chili sauce
1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast halves
2 to 3 cups Boston, Romain, iceberg lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, mix the mayonnaise or salad dressing with water, barbecue sauce, vinegar, crumbled chives, garlic powder, and pepper until blended.
2. Place chicken breast halves in a 6-quart pot. Add enough water to cover the chicken. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until the internal temperature of the chicken reaches 165°F (74°C) at the thickest part. Remove with tongs or a slotted spoon to a cutting board to cool.
4. Add enough water to the poaching liquid in the pot to cook the pasta, totaling about 4 quarts. Bring to a boil and add pasta. Cook for 9 minutes or until crisp. Drain on paper towels and cut into small pieces.
5. Add hot pasta to the dressing in the salad bowl. Toss to coat.
6. Cut chicken into bite-size pieces and add to the salad bowl along with bacon, lettuce, and tomatoes. Gently toss to mix.
7. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
